x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: MID Servers are required for AI Agent-triggered discovery, external integrations, and on-premise system connectivity. Missing MID Servers create gaps in AI Agent action coverage for hybrid infrastructure.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Deploy MID Servers for each network zone requiring AI Agent access. Validate MID Servers via ecc_agent_list.do. Upgrade MID Servers to match the instance version. AI Agents fail silently when required MID Servers are unavailable.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851cee
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[MID Servers are required for AI Agent-triggered discovery, external integrations, and on-premise system connectivity. Missing MID Servers create gaps in AI Agent action coverage for hybrid infrastructure.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>MID Server Availability</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("ecc_agent");
gr.addQuery("status","Up");
gr.query();
var up=gr.getRowCount();
var gr2=new GlideRecord("ecc_agent");
gr2.query();
var total=gr2.getRowCount();
return{status:up>=1?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:total+" MID Servers | "+up+" Up",finding:up<1?"No MID Servers are Up. AI Agent-triggered discovery probes and on-premise integrations will fail without available MID Servers.":""+up+" MID Servers are Up and available for AI Agent execution."};
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>PLATFORM</module>
<number>CHK0006112</number>
<order>80</order>
<remediation_guidance>Deploy MID Servers for each network zone requiring AI Agent access. Validate MID Servers via ecc_agent_list.do. Upgrade MID Servers to match the instance version. AI Agents fail silently when required MID Servers are unavailable.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851cee</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
